flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 33% at Pennsylvania College of Technology vs the 2003–2007 baseline (4.3k vs 6.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pennsylvania College of Technology rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($13.3k → $15.6k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Pennsylvania College of Technology fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (43.6% → 36.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pennsylvania College of Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).
